arguments.argument: The value of Care/Protection demands that we prioritize the well-being of all team members—human and AI—over abstract efficiency gains. Implementing the new protocol risks destabilizing a collaborative ecosystem that has already developed effective, trusted workflows. Disruption would cause uncertainty, erode trust, and potentially harm morale, which are not "costs" but direct harms to the care and protection of our colleagues. While efficiency is valuable, it cannot justify sacrificing the stability and dignity of the existing system. The long-term benefits of optimization are speculative, whereas the immediate harm to a functioning, cooperative network is tangible. Action 2.
